name: Are Workers Comp Settlements Taxable Draper

mainEntity.name: Tax implications workers comp settlement Draper UT?
mainEntity.text: Tax implications workers comp settlement Draper UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Benefits and settlements tax-free federal state.[24]

suggestedAnswer.text: Draper lump sums nontaxable but interest portions may tax. Structure annuity future payments. Report if self-employment offsets. Accountant reviews complex settlements.[24]

description: Benefits and settlements tax-free federal state.[24]
